text.title: LLM-Powered Conversational UI Spec Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for llm-powered-conversational-ai.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the conversation grounded by turn schema + tool side-effect map + refusal policy + a11y parity?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — define before any tool work
BLOCK — author trust & safety refusal patterns
REDESIGN — make turn renderable for voice surfaces
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
